data.content: Implementation review APPROVED: All 8 scoped files (agent-history-view 92L, terminal-panel 118L, beat-table 202L, lease-audit-view 317L, interaction-picker 465L, beat-columns 78L, beat-detail-lightbox 411L, history-debug-panel 370L) are under 500-line limit with zero ESLint warnings for max-lines, max-lines-per-function, or max-len. TypeScript compiles with zero errors. All 2239 tests pass across 165 test files. Extracted ~46 sub-component/hook files. Contract tests updated. No behavior changes detected.
